_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform interoperability testing on systems exchanging electronic information with other systems.
reference_document_element_description: Define enterprise data integration standards, including interface contracts, schema evolution policies, API versioning standards, and event schema governance.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.467), DA-K-004 (DA, cosine: 0.453).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.515). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [electronic, exchanging, information, interoperability, perform, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [api, contracts, data, define, enterprise, event] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.874, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Perform interoperability testing on systems exchanging electronic information wi" and "Define enterprise data integration standards, including interface contracts, sch" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.484 ≈ STS 0.515 (gap 0.031). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [electronic, exchanging, information, interoperability, perform, systems]. WIDAI terms: [api, contracts, data, define, enterprise, event].
